title: hymenasplenium excisum
intro: Hymenasplenium excisum, also known as the excised spleen fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hymenasplenium excisum include its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Hymenasplenium excisum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be consumed as a tea or used in the form of a tincture.
